_meta.purpose: iNaturalist taxonIds to skip when picking a wildlife line. Research-grade only means 2+ observers agreed on the ID — it does NOT filter for wild vs escaped/feral. Anything in this list is a real record but biologically uninformative for the almanac's 'in the saltmarsh now' framing.

excludedTaxa.reason: Native to Americas. All 6 records are a single escaped/aviary bird in a Holbury residential garden (Southbourne Avenue / Holbury Drove Shops). Same bird as goingbirding's 'BOAT-TAILED GRACKLE'.
